text: Immersed in this stark, futurist environment, my perception tilts just like the architecture around me. The glowing purple and clean glass evoke curiosity and a touch of alienation. Inside, the bold R+D emblazoned on the wall hints at progress and potential. Yet behind the innovation, I feel a tinge of vulnerability—standing at the intersection between creation and observation, I am both participant and witness. The juxtaposition of personal touches in a structured space invites me to reflect on my own role within evolving systems. I feel contemplative, slightly detached, yet drawn to understand how humanity and technology shape each other in this luminous cocoon.
